hero.title: Bring Financial Planning & Growth Simulation Together with AI
hero.subtitle: Process your data in seconds, build future scenarios, and get investor-ready.

features.heading: All Our Solutions
features.subheading: Manage your entire financial workflow — from bookkeeping to investor pitch — on a single platform.

ai.title: AI-Powered Data Entry
ai.ocr: Upload receipts & invoices; AI automatically handles VAT separation and expense categorization.
ai.bank: Upload bank statements to generate income/expense reports in seconds.

reporting.title: Comprehensive Financial Reporting
reporting.official: Easily import trial balances, balance sheets, and prior-period income statements.
reporting.realtime: Monitor your company's financial health in real time from a single dashboard.

simulation.title: Growth Simulation
simulation.model: Build AI-powered growth simulations based on your base-year data.
simulation.compare: Analyze financial differences between multiple scenarios in detail.

investor.title: Investor Readiness
investor.capital: Automatically calculate the capital you need to reach your growth targets.
investor.pitch: Turn your analyses into a professional investor pitch deck in seconds.

upload.title: Upload Your Data
upload.desc: Feed your receipts, invoices, bank statements or trial balance into the system.

scenario.title: Build Your Scenario
scenario.desc: Set your future targets and let AI create your growth simulation.

output.title: Get Your Output
output.desc: Clarify your capital needs and download your investor pitch deck.
